data: With a common vision, we developed a brand that is reflective of Revogen's innovative and high-quality products that help patients heal.
Made possible by the people thinking of other's need at the time of their loss

We've enjoyed a lengthy partnership with SummitTrek and consider it an honor to create tools for their coaching practice that bring lasting impact in the lives and businesses of their clients. We help communicate on their behalf by way of brand re-design, monthly workbooks, email newsletters, assorted print materials and websites. Summit is in the business of transforming and restoring lives and businesses to their original intended purpose and we love helping them do that.

Summit makes use of carefully curated quotes throughout their materials. When we recently re-designed their brand we made sure to identify a font that felt authentically hand written, to give the personal touch whenever short quotes are displayed.

We've created a comprehensive system of tools, worksheets, workbooks all with a simple minimalistic aesthetic. We never want the design to get in the way of the process or the meaningful exercises the user is experiencing.
One of the most impactful Summit offerings is the Life Planning Retreat. The weekend is an opportunity to Rekindle Your Passions. Discover Your Purpose and Live Differently.
our process is found in restoring leaders and organizations to their original intened purpose through coaching

Medical Solutions of Texas is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Business (SDVOSB) that acts as the bridge between medical supply companies and the Department of Defense and VA hospitals. They have the connections and experience to help private companies sell their medical suplies and solutions to the government.

MSOT's lacked a brand, identity and website that looked legitimate in the eyes of the medical community or the military end user. So, we developed a brand that was inspired by stenciled and angular military lettering and logistics shipping containers. The brand uses a color palette sampled from camoflauge and carries with it that tactical "we get it done" mentality.
The lettering is distinctive, simple and no nonsense.

The MSOT website is a place for medical supply sales reps to understand how to sell to the government. Pages help the view understand how MSOT helps clarify a complex process. We featured "end users." The ultimate recipients of the  medical care offered and featured them over the lifetime of military service from new recruits, to growing families all the way up to retired and aging combat veterans.
Our websites are always designed and programmed with desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile experiences in mind.
putting while someone else holds a branded flag

After a life-changing experiencing at a Youth Peace Camp in Serbia, founder Shane Hanson knew his purpose was to create a non-profit that served Foster Youth through sports, mentorship, and training. Due to the deeply flawed foster care system,  many children who need safe and secure environments are left with a lack of structure and resources. Freedom Youth Foundation was created to help fill that gap along side a community of amazing volunteers and sponsors. They care for thousands of foster kids each year in California, Idaho and Mexico.
With a brand that has good standing within the communities they serve, it was important to honor the intent of FYF's original logo.
Once a concise look and feel was created, we quickly developed all collateral for their day-to-day operations, marketing, and events.
In a recent fundraising event, we donated our services to create branded and marketing materials for a golf tournament.
branded signs for each golf hole
hero image of putting with flag
A vision to give the new headquarters the feel of an inviting stylish hotel.
The design aesthetic of the Oprah Winfrey Network HQ can be described as "boutique hotel meets corporate office."

Environmental graphics were constructed with natural materials and unique touches. We designed the signage system to complement that aesthetic and in some cases blend into walls discretely. We chose the same oak used for the flooring and furniture, while balancing that warmth with a contemporary matte finish clear acrylic. The acrylic is back painted to match the wall color (hiding any unsightly mounting hardware). We collaborated with the Looking design studio, who oversaw the creative direction of the signage and HLW International, who led the overall interior design efforts.
We work hard and smart to efficiently deliver excellence to our clients.
With client's and executives flying in, the signs were paired with a vinyl printing system that OWN can manage, allowing them to be ready for any guest who may arrive with a matching nameplate.
A mission to create beautiful and affordable lighting for the home

Progress lighting is one of the nation's largest and oldest producers and manufacturers of residential lighting solutions. Being a company that works in such high volume, it would easy to sacrifice beauty for utility. But with a stellar in-house product design team and partnering with an Elle Decor Top 100 designer, you'll see that's not the case. That's really the story here for us, with catalogs of hundreds of pages and thousands of images, how do you not let that immense task get in the way of good design.

Being details and logistics focused, we've found ways to organize and communicate their brand in elegant ways. Whether it's a nearly one-thousand page product catalog, or designer brochure, we've recognized their need to produce beautiful marketing materials at high volumes. Since working with Progress Lighting, they've been recognized in the MarCom Awards for outstanding communication and design, winning Platinum for the Jeffrey Alan Marks Catalog and Gold for Experience Progress Magazine.

The flagship catalog of all their products. The conceptually drives the look and feel of all other peripheral marketing materials. This is still a valuable sales tool and the fastest way to peruse all the products.
Design Series - Jeffrey Alan Marks Collection

A fitting collaboration between dreamer and maker. Jeffrey's purposeful and authentic spaces beg to be lived in rather than existing only to be stylish. Today this Elle Décor A-List designer's spirited aesthetic is realized beyond his fortunate clients through licensing partnerships and a broader audience can look forward to homes that are more genuine, more personal and more engaging.
Multiple volumes per year of a magazine that showcases product, installations, designers and trends within the residential lighting industry.
high end furniture in a stone room
Creating high-end custom furniture for the hospitality market and winning, a proverbial David among Goliaths
Manufacturing Fine Furnishings for the world's most exceptional hotels and resorts since 2006.

Composition hangs its hat on Innovative Service + Resourceful Solutions. They've earned a reputation for the highest level of service in the industry, and have worked with some of the most talented craftsmen, artisans, mills, shops, factories and vendors around the globe. Their mission is to provide superior products that are a perfect fit for the composition of each clients installation. 

The idea of endless combinations led us to create a semi-fluid identity, based on the arrangement of the three "O's" from the word composition. The logo, like the service is simple, flexible and versatile with the ability to create endless compositions.
A fluid identity that is able to adapt to the context of its use.
Well-thought creativity that tells a story.
Composition's logo evolved into a mark that told the company's story and served as a driving element for future applications.
We created a system of wood and metal finish samples that appeal to designers, and prioritize usability.
putting while someone else holds a branded flag

Due to the deeply flawed foster care system,  many children who need safe and secure environments are left with a lack of structure and resources. Freedom Youth Foundation was created to help fill that gap along side a community of amazing volunteers and sponsors. They care for thousands of foster kids each year in California, Idaho and Mexico.
With a brand that has good standing within the communities they serve, it was important to honor the intent of FYF's original logo.

We partnered Gallery Sonder to build a brand representative of their immersive, community-oriented space for artists and enthusiasts. Our collaborative effort resulted in a beautiful and bold design that invites you into the unique narrative of each individual artist.
big geometric sculpture and wall art
The brand is developed around the concept of a portal that allows for a peek into the art, but expands into an immersive experience.
extended versions of each letter in both directions
all the artist names with their art put in an extended letter
We approached all branded materials with the intention of creating a feeling of intrigue, through keyholes, and immersion, through expanding and revealing elements.
To focus on the artists and their forthcoming show, invitations represent a peek into the artwork, showing a cropped and detailed portion of a piece.
To complete the experience, we created signage engaging passersby on foot and by car.
After much anticipation, Gallery Sonder celebrated its opening night November 2024. The gallery will be a showcase for fresh, up and coming talent.
